summary: Doctor reports ready with checks for packaged Plugin Skills and manifest plugin state: plugin_manifest, plugin_skills, and manifest_plugin_state are passing alongside project structure, active goal recoverability, architecture, manifest, and build-vs-buy health.
reviewability: Run doctor and inspect data.status, checks, recovery_actions, data.plugin, and active_goals.
limitations: This validates current source checkout package assets; a broken published npm package would need package-level smoke testing before release.
